title: error TS2322: Type '{ hitsPerPage: number; }' is not assignable to type 'IntrinsicAttributes & PlainSearchParameters'.   Property 'hitsPerPage' does not exist on type 'IntrinsicAttributes & PlainSearchParameters'.  70           <Configure hitsPerPage={4} />
